body.content:
Dear IT Team，

Due to business requirements, bank accounts are required for clearing operations in the Allegro system. 

However, the relevant bank account has not yet been configured in the system, 

which is affecting daily clearing processes.

To ensure smooth business operations going forward,

we kindly request that the following bank account be added to the system and enabled for clearing purposes:

Bank Name: MIZUHO BANK , Ltd.（0001）

Branch Name: GINZA BRANCH（035）

Account Type: Saving Account

Account Number:4352036

Account Name: 海和海運株式会社（KAIWA SHIPPING Co., Ltd.）

SWIFT CODE：MHCBJPJT

Bank Address：

〒104-0061東京都中央区銀座4-2-11(4-2-11 Ginza, Chuo-ku, Tokyo 104-0061, Japan)

Please let us know if any additional information or further action is required.
